dirtyBaseline.scopeCheckRequirement: Later waves must compare actual changed paths against this manifest and fail on unmapped source or generated/dist edits unless fresh authorization expands scope.

combinedFocused.summary: 6 files / 224 tests passed: subagent-announce-output, compaction, and compaction-safeguard suites across agents-core/agents-support

baseline.noManualDistPatchPolicy: Do not edit bundled/generated/hashed dist artifacts directly; map traces back to source and regenerate only in an authorized build/release step.

surfaces.owner: formats internal task_completion events and plain-prompt variants used to wake/requester sessions
selects latest child visible output, result text, compact findings, and completion reply capture
no existing canonical child contract/classifier module; current runtime only has transport/status constants and text extraction
surfaces.blocker: Wave 1 must add/own canonical transportOutcome, contractVerdict, acceptanceEligible, and classifier enum validation before acceptance gating.

surfaces.owner: exact artifact reservation/freshness/hash/schema postflight is not centralized today; spawn and announce surfaces carry child/task data but do not enforce file-backed verdict acceptance
surfaces.blocker: No current source owner found for exact required-output artifact schema/hash/freshness persistence; Wave 3 should create or explicitly assign this owner.

surfaces.owner: tool-result capping/redaction exists for session persistence; child raw-body quarantine storage for malformed subagent output is not yet a first-class surface
surfaces.blocker: Need new quarantine artifact schema/location and retention policy; do not use raw transcript injection as storage.

surfaces.owner: announce idempotency and registry query/read-index helpers own stable child-run lookup; retry mechanism limits are not yet contract-aware
surfaces.blocker: Need persistent duplicate counters keyed by active task contract plus child/run/session/result hash.

surfaces.owner: mediated/direct requester wake, origin resolution, retry, and delivery result selection
skip-token helpers and agent step reply extraction own non-deliverable reply suppression paths
surfaces.blocker: Need explicit NO_REPLY/suppressed_reply audit event handling; existing token helpers cover ANNOUNCE_SKIP/REPLY_SKIP but not full Wave 2 status-card contract.

surfaces.owner: current internal-event formatter is closest owner; structured status-card/progress-pulse schema is absent
surfaces.blocker: No current typed status-card schema; Wave 2/10 should add bounded data-only rendering.

surfaces.owner: summary generation/chunking, real-conversation filtering, quality safeguard, and successor transcript rotation
active-memory plugin registers before_prompt_build prependContext and command toggles; its output is explicitly untrusted context but can still enter prompt prefix
surfaces.blocker: Need task-priority conflict metadata at core prompt assembly; plugin should remain non-authorizing background context.

surfaces.owner: session reference resolution, session history/list tools, helper row shaping, and CLI session-key resolution
surfaces.blocker: src/agents/command/session.resolve-session-key.ts is not a source file; its test maps to src/agents/command/session.ts.

surfaces.owner: sessions list tool sanitizes transcript fields and status rows; local bounded fallback is not yet identified as a separate helper
surfaces.blocker: Need safe local-index fallback that emits canonical key/session id/file path/label/timestamps only after gateway timeout.

surfaces.owner: no state/orchestrator source-state helper exists in this worktree; source tree lacks scripts/render-state.py, state/orchestrator.json, STATE.md, and src/orchestrator/state-query.ts
surfaces.blocker: Wave 8 must create/find canonical state-query helper before Wave 6 authorization gates; current worktree has no authoritative owner.

surfaces.owner: no OpenClaw core autoresearch/project-initiation automation owner found in this source tree from targeted search; QA-lab has subagent fanout scenario tests only
surfaces.blocker: Existing autonomous research/autoresearch source surface may live in an unmerged/other branch or runtime state; Wave 6 must first bind only discovered/mapped triggers and must not invent new automation.

surfaces.owner: vitest runner process groups, no-output watchdog, signal forwarding, profiling wrapper, and log output forwarding
surfaces.blocker: Baseline observed subagent-announce-output tests reported pass but wrapper timed out waiting for process exit; Wave 9 should treat stale process cleanup as acceptance-gating.

surfaces.owner: subagent capability store, spawn runtime preparation, and tool allow/deny inheritance determine what a spawned checker can use
surfaces.blocker: Current preflight is capability/session-shape oriented; Wave 9 must add required artifact write/read/tool/runtime-duration checks before dispatch.

surfaces.owner: no dedicated source helper found for per-task dirty baseline/expected-diff enforcement; Wave 0 artifact acts as seed manifest
surfaces.blocker: Need source-owned scope-check helper before later waves can machine-reject unexpected path edits.

surfaces.owner: authoritative source is this worktree; installed/bundled hashed outputs under /usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist are breadcrumbs only
surfaces.blocker: Manual edits to bundled/generated/hashed dist artifacts are forbidden; regenerate only from mapped source in an explicitly authorized release/build wave.

expectedDiff.scopeCheckRequirement: Later waves must compare actual repo changed paths against currentWaveAllowedChangedPaths/laterWaveAllowedSourceGlobs/sourceImplementationRoots and fail on unmapped source, generated/dist, live-config, secret, or broad-staging edits unless fresh authorization expands scope.
expectedDiff.externalHarnessPolicy: External workspace/control-plane paths may be reconciled for orchestrator bookkeeping only; they are not OpenClaw source implementation evidence and must be reviewed separately.
forbiddenSurfacesByDefault: manual edits to bundled/generated/hashed dist artifacts
live gateway config/provider/channel changes or gateway restart as part of implementation
secrets, private keys, tokens, .env files, auth profiles, and credential stores
broad git add -A staging instead of exact-path staging
scope expansion beyond the two named authorized plans

blockers.rationale: No current source module owns canonical transportOutcome/contractVerdict/acceptanceEligible or classifier enum validation.
No current source owner found for exact required-output path reservation, freshness/hash/schema validation, and artifact hash persistence.
Session tool-result capping exists, but malformed subagent raw-output quarantine artifact storage/retention is not mapped as a first-class owner.
Worktree lacks scripts/render-state.py, src/orchestrator/state-query.ts, state/orchestrator.json, and STATE.md; Wave 8 must create/find canonical state query before Wave 6 relies on it.
Targeted search found QA-lab fanout scenarios but no core autoresearch/project-initiation automation source in this worktree; Wave 6 must bind only real mapped triggers.
Focused subagent output tests reported pass but run wrapper timed out waiting for process exit; recorded as stale-process/gate-management baseline evidence.

acceptedWave0FocusedGate.summary: 6 files / 224 tests passed; parent-observed process exited 0

supersededIndividualGate.summary: Vitest reported 2 files / 12 tests passed but wrapper timeout killed non-exiting runner; retained only as Wave 9 stale-process evidence

gateEvidenceReconciliation.acceptanceDecision: Wave 0 source-map/fixture gate acceptance should rely on artifact validation, git status/diff-check, and the combined focused gate exit 0; the 124 record is not claimed as a passing acceptance gate.

wave0AcceptanceNotes: All 24 audited issues now carry explicit sourceSurfaceIds and fixtureIds in the manifest.
Expected diff separates current source-repo artifact paths, external harness/control-plane roots, and scratch /tmp artifacts.
Generated/bundled dist, live config/restart, secrets/credentials, force-push/history rewrite, broad git add -A, and external side-effect surfaces are forbidden by default.
Focused baseline acceptance uses the combined 224-test log that exited 0; the earlier individual subagent-output timeout is recorded only as Wave 9 stale-process evidence.
No runtime/source implementation changes were made in Wave 0 beyond source-map/manifest/fixture artifacts.
privacyPolicy: Wave 0 fixtures and manifests use synthetic minimized shapes only. Raw child chat payloads, private transcripts, logs, env/auth/secret data, and long grep/source dumps must not be pasted into parent-visible artifacts.
